USE P21;
SET NOCOUNT ON; SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
SELECT result_set='transfer_hdr_insert_modules', object_name=OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(m.object_id)+'.'+OBJECT_NAME(m.object_id), type_desc=o.type_desc,
       pos_insert=CONVERT(varchar(20),NULLIF(PATINDEX('%INSERT%transfer_hdr%',m.definition),0)),
       pos_oe_flag=CONVERT(varchar(20),NULLIF(CHARINDEX('oe_transfer_reserve_flag',m.definition),0)),
       snippet=SUBSTRING(m.definition, CASE WHEN NULLIF(PATINDEX('%INSERT%transfer_hdr%',m.definition),0)>500 THEN PATINDEX('%INSERT%transfer_hdr%',m.definition)-500 ELSE 1 END, 2500)
FROM sys.sql_modules m JOIN sys.objects o ON o.object_id=m.object_id
WHERE PATINDEX('%INSERT%transfer_hdr%',m.definition)>0
ORDER BY object_name;
SELECT result_set='oe_flag_modules', object_name=OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(m.object_id)+'.'+OBJECT_NAME(m.object_id), type_desc=o.type_desc,
       snippet=SUBSTRING(m.definition, CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('oe_transfer_reserve_flag',m.definition)>500 THEN CHARINDEX('oe_transfer_reserve_flag',m.definition)-500 ELSE 1 END, 2500)
FROM sys.sql_modules m JOIN sys.objects o ON o.object_id=m.object_id
WHERE m.definition LIKE '%oe_transfer_reserve_flag%'
ORDER BY object_name;

-- Description:	Returns the number of transfer shipments 
-- and transfer shipment lines. 
-- =============================================

SET NOCOUNT ON

BEGIN

	DECLARE	 @transfer_exclusion_key			VARCHAR(255)
	SELECT	 @transfer_exclusion_key			= 'NUM_SHIPMENT_TRANSFER'

	DECLARE	@ltbl_temp_identity	TABLE	(
				Id	INT	IDENTITY(1,1)
				,company_id	VARCHAR(8)
				,location_id	DECIMAL(19,0)
				,number_of_shipments	INT
				,number_of_shipment_lines	INT	)

	INSERT INTO	@ltbl_temp_identity
    SELECT	hdr.company_id AS company_id
			,hdr.from_location_id AS location_id
			,COUNT(DISTINCT hdr.transfer_no) number_of_shipments
			,COUNT(ship_line.transfer_line_no) AS number_of_shipment_lines
	FROM	transfer_hdr hdr (NOLOCK)
	JOIN	transfer_shipment_hdr ship_hdr (NOLOCK) ON ship_hdr.transfer_no = hdr.transfer_no
	JOIN	transfer_shipment_line ship_line (NOLOCK) ON ship_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = ship_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid
	WHERE	ship_hdr.ship_date BETWEEN @start_date AND @end_date
		AND hdr.delete_flag <> 'Y'
		AND @transfer_exclusion_key NOT IN (SELECT value FROM p21_fn_split(@num_shipment_exclusions, ','))
	GROUP BY
		hdr.company_id
		,hdr.from_location_id
	ORDER BY
		hdr.company_id
		,hdr.from_location_id

	SELECT	*
	FROM	@ltbl_temp_identity

END

PROCESSING ----------
	-- Need to update the transfer_backorders table.  If a record already exists, just update
	-- the existing record, otherwise we will need to create one.
	
	CREATE TABLE #transfer_backorder
	(
		temp_transfer_backorder_uid INTEGER IDENTITY NOT NULL,
		inv_mast_uid INTEGER NOT NULL,  
		source_location_id DECIMAL(19,0) NOT NULL,
		destination_location_id DECIMAL(19,9) NOT NULL,
		qty_backordered DECIMAL(19,9) NOT NULL
	)
	
	-- First, update existing records.
	INSERT INTO #transfer_backorder (
		inv_mast_uid,
		source_location_id,
		destination_location_id,
		qty_backordered
	)
	SELECT
			deallocate_transactions_run.inv_mast_uid,
			deallocate_transactions_run.location_id source_location_id,
			location.location_id destination_location_id,
			SUM(deallocate_transactions_run.qty_to_deallocate) qty_backordered
	FROM	deallocate_transactions_run
	INNER JOIN transfer_hdr ON deallocate_transactions_run.transaction_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no
	INNER JOIN location ON transfer_hdr.to_location_id = location.location_id
	WHERE	deallocate_transactions_run.deallocate_transactions_run_no = @al_RunNo
		AND deallocate_transactions_run.document_type = 'TS'
		AND EXISTS (	SELECT	1
						FROM	transfer_backorders
						WHERE	transfer_backorders.source_location_id = deallocate_transactions_run.location_id
						AND		transfer_backorders.destination_location_id = location.location_id
						AND		transfer_backorders.inv_mast_uid = deallocate_transactions_run.inv_mast_uid	)
	GROUP BY deallocate_transactions_run.inv_mast_uid,
			 deallocate_transactions_run.location_id,
			 location.location_id


	UPDATE	transfer_backorders
	SET		qty_backordered = transfer_backorders.qty_backordered + #transfer_backorder.qty_backordered
	FROM	transfer_backorders
	INNER JOIN #transfer_backorder ON transfer_backorders.source_location_id = #transfer_backorder.source_location_id
				AND transfer_backorders.destination_location_id = #transfer_backorder.destination_location_id
				AND transfer_backorders.inv_mast_uid = #transfer_backorder.inv_mast_uid
	
	-- Clear the table so we can re-populate with information to create new records.
	DELETE FROM #transfer_backorder
	
	-- Now create new transfer_backorders records.
	INSERT INTO #transfer_backorder (
	inv_mast_uid,
	source_location_id,
	destination_location_id,
	qty_backordered
	)
	SELECT
			deallocate_transactions_run.inv_mast_uid,
			deallocate_transactions_run.location_id

ck_tags CHAR(1)
	DECLARE @ld_current_timestamp datetime
	
	SET @ld_current_timestamp = dbo.p21_fn_GetSystemDatetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,NULL,NULL)

	(from_location_id int
	,to_location_id int
	,transfer_no int

	)
 
	INSERT INTO @InvLocUnalloc

		FROM transfer_hdr
		INNER JOIN location on location.location_id = transfer_hdr.from_location_id
		INNER JOIN company ON company.company_id = location.company_id
		INNER JOIN transfer_line on transfer_hdr.transfer_no = transfer_line.transfer_no
		INNER JOIN inv_mast on inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = transfer_line.inv_mast_uid

	select @from_location_id= InvLocUnalloc.from_location_id

		,@track_serials = InvLocUnalloc.track_serials
		,@track_bins = InvLocUnalloc.track_bins
		,@track_lots = InvLocUnalloc.track_lots
		,@track_lot_bins = InvLocUnalloc.track_lot_bins
		,@track_tags = InvLocUnalloc.track_tags
	   
	from @InvLocUnalloc InvLocUnalloc
    
	------ TRANSFER PROCESSING -------  
	UPDATE transfer_line  
	SET qty_to_transfer = 0
	,unit_quantity = 0
	,units_requested = 0
	-- Unlike other transactions, Transfers do not really have a "qty_allocated" field.  The unit_quantity essentially  
	-- is how much is allocated.  If we decrease the quantity to 0, then we need to update the delete_flag as all quantity  
	-- will be put on a transfer backorder.  
	,delete_flag = 'Y'  
	,date_last_modified = @ld_current_timestamp 
	,last_maintaine

LEFT JOIN system_setting use_lot_cost_as_inventory_cost on (use_lot_cost_as_inventory_cost.name='use_lot_cost_as_inventory_cost')   
	LEFT JOIN system_setting slab_enabled on (slab_enabled.name='slab_enabled')

	LEFT JOIN system_setting assign_bins_at_order_entry on (assign_bins_at_order_entry.name='assign_bins_at_order_entry')   

	IF (@as_AllItems = 1)
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO #lt_Items  
				(inv_mast_uid)  
			SELECT	inv_loc.inv_mast_uid  
			FROM	inv_loc  
			INNER JOIN location on (location.location_id = inv_loc.location_id)  
							   AND (location.delete_flag = 'N')  
			INNER JOIN inv_mast ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)  
							   AND (inv_mast.delete_flag = 'N')  
							   AND (inv_mast.product_type <> 'L')  
			LEFT JOIN assembly_hdr ON (assembly_hdr.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid)  
								  AND (assembly_hdr.delete_flag = 'N')  
			-- 01/31/12- Add code to block tag items
			WHERE	inv_mast.use_tags_flag = 'N'
			  AND	COALESCE(inv_loc.delete_flag,'N') = 'N'
			  AND	inv_mast.other_charge_item = 'N'
			  AND	COALESCE(assembly_hdr.production_order_processing, 'Y') <> 'N'
			  AND	(COALESCE(inv_mast.track_lots, 'N') = 'N' OR @as_reset = 1)  
			  AND	NOT EXISTS  
					(SELECT	1  
					 FROM	inv_loc inv_loc2  
					 WHERE	inv_loc2.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid  
					   AND	inv_loc2.requisition = 'Y')  
			GROUP BY inv_loc.inv_mast_uid
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN  
		IF (@as_ProductGroup = '-1' AND @as_ItemID = '-1' AND  @as_ItemLike = '-1' and @as_AllSlabItems=1)  
		BEGIN  
			INSERT INTO #lt_Items  
			(inv_mast_uid)  
			select inv_mast.inv_mast_uid from inv_mast where inv_mast.product_type='S' and inv_mast.delete_flag= 'N' and inv_mast.track_lots = 'N'  
		END  

		-- 12.15 08/21/15 - JRL - SCOPUS #1327279 - Add new options for assemblies for either filtering out assembly for stock items or no filtering.   
		IF (@as_ProductGroup = '-1' AND @as_ItemID = '-1' AND  @as_ItemLike = '-1' and @as_AllAssemblyItemsNoAssemblyForStock=1 and @as_AllAssemblyItems=0)  
		BEGIN  
			INSERT INTO #lt_Items  
			(inv_mast_uid)  
			SELECT inv_mast.inv_mast_uid FROM inv_mast
			INNER join assembly_hdr ON assembly_hdr.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
			and assembly_hdr.production_order_processing = 'Y' 
			and assembly_hdr.assembly_for_stock = 'N'
			and assembly

CREATE PROCEDURE p21_exec_metric_po_loc_rebuild
AS

SET NOCOUNT ON

DELETE temp_po_loc_summary
DELETE summary_po_loc_daily

INSERT INTO summary_po_loc_daily
(
	company_id
	, location_id
	, summary_date
	, summary_group_cd
	, summary_cd
	, summary_value
	, summary_hdr_count
	, summary_line_count
)
SELECT
	COALESCE(po_hdr.company_no, transfer_hdr.company_id) as company_id
	, COALESCE(po_hdr.location_id, transfer_hdr.to_location_id) as location_id
	, CONVERT(VARCHAR(255), inventory_receipts_hdr.date_created, 10) as date_created
	, 1304 AS group_code
	, CASE
		WHEN po_hdr.po_type in ('B','P','S','N') THEN 1687
		WHEN po_hdr.po_type = 'D' THEN 1688
		WHEN po_hdr.po_type = 'R' THEN 1689
		WHEN po_hdr.po_no is null THEN 1690
	end as type
	, SUM
	(
		CASE
			WHEN inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_type = 'T' THEN inventory_receipts_line.qty_received * ( COALESCE(inventory_receipts_line.unit_cost, 0) / inventory_receipts_line.pricing_unit_size )
			ELSE COALESCE(inventory_receipts_line.extended_cost, 0)
		END
	) as value
	, COUNT(DISTINCT inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_number) as hdr_count
	, COUNT(*) as line_count
FROM 
	inventory_receipts_hdr (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN inventory_receipts_line  (NOLOCK)
		on inventory_receipts_line.receipt_number = inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_number
	LEFT OUTER JOIN po_hdr  (NOLOCK)
		on po_hdr.po_no = inventory_receipts_hdr.po_number
		and po_hdr.po_type in ('B','P','S','N','D','R')
		and inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_type = 'P'
	LEFT OUTER JOIN transfer_shipment_hdr  (NOLOCK)
		on transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = inventory_receipts_hdr.po_number 
		and inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_type = 'T'
	LEFT OUTER JOIN transfer_hdr (NOLOCK)
		ON transfer_hdr.transfer_no = transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no 
		AND inventory_receipts_hdr.receipt_type = 'T'
WHERE
	COALESCE(po_hdr.company_no, transfer_hdr.company_id) IS NOT NULL
	AND inventory_receipts_hdr.delete_flag = 'N'
	AND inventory_receipts_hdr.approved = 'Y'
	-- 12.8 CAA 09/27/11 - Scopus# 974550: Exclude Inventory Receipts that have been reversed.
	AND inventory_receipts_line.date_receipt_removed IS NULL
GROUP BY  
	COALESCE(po_hdr.company_no, transfer_hdr.company_id)
	, COALESCE(po_hdr.location_id, transfer_hdr.to_location_id) 
	, CONVERT(VARCHAR(255), inventory_receipts_hdr.date_created, 10) 
	, CASE
		WHEN po_hdr.po_type in ('B','P','S','N') THEN 1687
		WHEN po_hdr.po_type = 'D' THEN 1688
		WHEN po_hd

_fully_received 			Int 			NULL  
					   ,year_fully_received 			Int 			NULL  
					   ,from_location_id 				DECIMAL(19,0) NOT NULL 
					   ,to_location_id 					DECIMAL(19,0) NOT NULL 
					   ,linked_transaction_type_cd 		Int NOT NULL  
					   ,linked_transaction_number 		VarChar(255) NOT NULL  
					   ,branch_id 						varchar(8) NOT NULL
					   ,currency_id 					INT NOT NULL)
  
AS  
BEGIN  
	DECLARE  @YearPeriod Int = (@Year * 1000 + @Period)  

	 -- Populate Table Data.  
	INSERT INTO @Report  
  
	SELECT transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_no 'transaction_number'  
		,2172 'transaction_type_cd' -- TransferShipments  
		,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_line_uid  
		,transfer_shipment_hdr.period  
		,transfer_shipment_hdr.year_for_period  
		,transfer_shipment_hdr.ship_date
		,transfer_shipment_hdr.date_created  
		,transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped * transfer_shipment_line.projected_receipt_cost 'transaction_amount'  
		,inventory_receipts_hdr.period  
		,inventory_receipts_hdr.year_for_period  
		,transfer_hdr.from_location_id
		,transfer_hdr.to_location_id
		,1690 'linked_transaction_type_cd' -- Transfers  
		,transfer_hdr.transfer_no 'linked_transaction_number'  
	    ,COALESCE(from_location.default_branch_id,'0') AS branch_id
		,from_company.home_currency_id AS currency_id
	 FROM p21_view_transfer_shipment_hdr AS transfer_shipment_hdr 
    INNER JOIN transfer_shipment_line (NOLOCK) ON transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid  
    INNER JOIN transfer_hdr (NOLOCK) ON transfer_hdr.transfer_no = transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no   
    INNER JOIN transfer_line (NOLOCK) ON transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no
									 AND transfer_line.line_no = transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
    INNER JOIN location from_location (NOLOCK) ON transfer_hdr.from_location_id = from_location.location_id   
    INNER JOIN location to_location (NOLOCK) ON transfer_hdr.to_location_id = to_location.location_id
											AND to_location.company_id = from_location.company_id
	INNER JOIN company (NOLOCK) AS from_company ON from_company.company_id = from_location.company_id 
				AND from_company.use_intracompany_inv_tracking_flag = 'Y'
     LEFT JOIN p21_view_inventory_receipts_hdr AS inventory_receipts_hdr ON inventory_receipts_hdr.po_number = transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_no
																		AND inventory_receipts_hdr.rec

SET @TransactionType_OpenRequirement  = 3554


DECLARE @SysSetting_UseProdOrderRequiredDates CHAR(1)
DECLARE @SysSetting_DefaultTransferDays INT

SELECT @SysSetting_UseProdOrderRequiredDates = COALESCE(value, 'N')
FROM system_setting 
WHERE name = 'use_prodreqdate_on_commtsched'

SELECT @SysSetting_DefaultTransferDays = COALESCE(CAST(value AS INT), 0)
FROM system_setting
WHERE name = 'number_of_days'
  

--PURCHASE ORDERS
--Normal PO lines, i.e. not on a vessel, not scheduled
INSERT INTO @InboundTransactions (transaction_type_cd, transaction_no, line_no, expected_date, sku_qty_incoming)
SELECT	@TransactionType_PurchaseOrder
		,po_line.po_no
		,po_line.line_no
		,COALESCE(po_line.date_due, po_hdr.date_due)
		,po_line.qty_ordered 
			- po_line.qty_received
			- COALESCE(drv_linked_orders.total_linked_qty, 0)
			- COALESCE(drv_linked_prods.total_linked_qty, 0)
			- COALESCE(drv_linked_msps.total_linked_qty, 0)
			- COALESCE(drv_linked_tbos.total_linked_qty, 0)
			- COALESCE(drv_vessel_receipts_lines.total_qty_on_vessel_receipts, 0)
FROM po_line
INNER JOIN po_hdr ON po_hdr.po_no = po_line.po_no
LEFT  JOIN (SELECT	SUM(oe_line_po.quantity_on_po)	AS total_linked_qty
					,oe_line_po.po_no
					,oe_line_po.po_line_number
			FROM oe_line_po 
			WHERE oe_line_po.connection_type = 'P'
			  AND oe_line_po.delete_flag = 'N'
			  AND oe_line_po.cancel_flag = 'N'
			  AND oe_line_po.completed = 'N'
			GROUP BY oe_line_po.po_no
					,oe_line_po.po_line_number
		) drv_linked_orders ON drv_linked_orders.po_no = po_line.po_no
							AND drv_linked_orders.po_line_number = po_line.line_no
LEFT  JOIN (SELECT	SUM(prod_ord_line_po.quantity) AS	total_linked_qty
					,prod_ord_line_po.po_number
					,prod_ord_line_po.po_line_number
			FROM prod_ord_line_po 
			WHERE prod_ord_line_po.connection_type = 'P'
			  AND prod_ord_line_po.row_status_flag = 702
			GROUP BY prod_ord_line_po.po_number
					,prod_ord_line_po.po_line_number
		) drv_linked_prods ON drv_linked_prods.po_number = po_line.po_no
							AND drv_linked_prods.po_line_number = po_line.line_no
LEFT  JOIN (SELECT	SUM(link_quantity.quantity)	AS total_linked_qty
					,link_quantity.from_uid
			FROM link_quantity
			WHERE link_quantity.from_type_cd = 916
			  AND link_quantity.to_type_cd = 1229
			  AND link_quantity.row_status_flag = 704
			GROUP BY link_quantity.from_uid
		) drv_linked_msps ON drv_linked_msps.from_uid = po_line.po_line_uid
LEFT  JOIN (SELECT	SUM(

, ship2_name varchar(50)
		, ship2_add1 varchar(50)
		, ship2_add2 varchar(50)
		, ship2_city varchar(50)
		, ship2_state varchar(50)
		, ship2_zip varchar(10)
		, ship2_country varchar(50)
		, carrier_id int
	)
	AS
BEGIN
	/*
		Returns basic information about a Scan and Pack Shipment:
			- Transaction Context ("Pick Ticket", "Transfer", etc.)
			- From Location ID and Carrier ID
			- Destination address information
			- Retrieval/Row Status/Complete information
	*/
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @ScanPackBasicInfo
		SELECT DISTINCT scan_pack.scan_pack_uid
			, scan_pack.transaction_context_cd
			, scan_pack.row_status_flag
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.location_id
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.to_address_id
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.ship2_name
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.ship2_add1
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.ship2_add2
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.ship2_city
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.ship2_state
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.ship2_zip
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.ship2_country
			, drv_consolidatedInfo.carrier_id
		FROM oe_pick_ticket WITH (NOLOCK)
		INNER JOIN scan_pack WITH (NOLOCK) ON ( scan_pack.scan_pack_uid = oe_pick_ticket.scan_pack_uid )
		LEFT JOIN (
				SELECT MAX( scan_pack.scan_pack_uid ) AS scan_pack_uid
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.address_id, 0 ) ) AS to_address_id
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.ship2_name, '' ) ) AS ship2_name
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.ship2_add1, '' ) ) AS ship2_add1
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.ship2_add2, '' ) ) AS ship2_add2
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.ship2_city, '' ) ) AS ship2_city
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.ship2_state, '' ) ) AS ship2_state
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.ship2_zip, '' ) ) AS ship2_zip
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_hdr.ship2_country, '' ) ) AS ship2_country
					, MAX( COALESCE( oe_pick_ticket.location_id, 0 ) ) AS location_id
					, MAX( oe_pick_ticket.carrier_id ) AS carrier_id
				FROM scan_pack WITH (NOLOCK)
				LEFT JOIN oe_pick_ticket WITH (NOLOCK) ON ( oe_pick_ticket.scan_pack_uid = scan_pack.scan_pack_uid )
				LEFT JOIN oe_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON ( oe_hdr.order_no = oe_pick_ticket.order_no )
				WHERE ( scan_pack.row_status_flag <> 700 )
				GROUP BY scan_pack.scan_pack_uid
					, scan_pack.row_status_flag
			) AS drv_consolidatedInfo ON ( drv_consolidatedInfo.scan_pack_uid = scan_pack.scan_pack_uid )
		WHERE ( scan_pack.transaction_context_cd = 1000 /* Pick Ticket */ )
			AND ( ( @scanPackUid IS NOT NULL AND scan_pack.scan_pack_uid = @scanPackUid ) OR ( @scanPackUid IS

LEFT JOIN assembly_hdr WITH (NOLOCK) ON ( assembly_hdr.inv_mast_uid = oe_pick_ticket_detail.inv_mast_uid )
			LEFT JOIN parentOeLineInfo ON ( parentOeLineInfo.oe_line_uid = oe_line.parent_oe_line_uid )
			WHERE ( oe_pick_ticket.scan_pack_uid = @scanPackUid )
				AND ( inv_mast.product_type <> 'L' ) 
				AND (
					( parentOeLineInfo.pack_by = 'C' )
					OR ( assembly_hdr.pack_by = 'H' )

CREATE FUNCTION p21_fnt_oe_xfer_reserve_qty ()
RETURNS @oe_xfer_reserve_qty TABLE
	(oe_xfer_reserve_qty	DECIMAL(19, 9)
	,location_id	DECIMAL(19, 0)
	,inv_mast_uid	INT)
AS
BEGIN
	INSERT INTO @oe_xfer_reserve_qty
			(oe_xfer_reserve_qty
			,location_id
			,inv_mast_uid)
		SELECT	SUM(CASE WHEN inv_loc.company_id = to_loc.company_id THEN
						CASE WHEN transfer_line.unit_quantity * transfer_line.unit_size >= transfer_line.qty_transferred THEN
							transfer_line.unit_quantity * transfer_line.unit_size - ISNULL(transfer_shipment_quantity, 0)
						ELSE
							transfer_line.qty_transferred - ISNULL(transfer_shipment_quantity, 0)
						END
					ELSE
						CASE WHEN transfer_line.unit_quantity * transfer_line.unit_size >= transfer_line.qty_transferred THEN
							transfer_line.unit_quantity * transfer_line.unit_size - transfer_line.qty_transferred
						ELSE
							0
						END
					END) oe_xfer_reserve_qty
				,inv_loc.location_id
				,inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
		FROM	inv_loc (NOLOCK)
		INNER JOIN inv_mast (NOLOCK) ON (inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)
		INNER JOIN transfer_hdr (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_hdr.from_location_id = inv_loc.location_id)
										AND (transfer_hdr.complete_flag <> 'Y')
		INNER JOIN location to_loc (NOLOCK) ON (to_loc.location_id = transfer_hdr.to_location_id)
		INNER JOIN transfer_line (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										 AND (transfer_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)
										 AND ((( transfer_line.row_status <> 1 )
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id = to_loc.company_id))
										  OR  ((transfer_line.row_status = 0)
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id <> to_loc.company_id)))
										 AND (transfer_line.delete_flag <> 'Y')
										 AND (COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') = 'Y')

		LEFT JOIN (SELECT	transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
							,SUM(CASE	WHEN transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received <= transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
												AND transfer_shipment_line.row_status_flag = 974 THEN
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received
										ELSE
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
								 END) AS transfer_shipment_quantity
				   FROM	transfer_shipment_line (NOLOCK)
				   INNER JOIN transfer_shipment_hdr (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid)

CREATE PROCEDURE p21_sp_create_otb_tbo_gtor_entries   
	( 
		   @al_SourceLocationID		INT,  
		   @al_InvMastUid			INT,  
		   @al_DestinationLocId		INT,  
		   @al_GTorRunNumber		INT 
	)
AS

BEGIN
  
INSERT INTO		gtor_run  
			(	gtor_run_number,   
				inv_mast_uid,  
				location_id,  
				source_location_id,  
				qty_on_obt,  
				total_qty_on_obt,   
				qty_on_tbo,  
				total_qty_on_tbo,   
				item_revision_uid 
			)  
  
SELECT			@al_GTorRunNumber,  
				drv.inv_mast_uid,  
				drv.location_id,  
				drv.source_location_id,  
				SUM(obt_qty_needed) qty_on_obt,  
				SUM(obt_qty_needed) total_qty_on_obt,  
				SUM(tbo_qty_needed) qty_on_tbo,  
				SUM(tbo_qty_needed) total_qty_on_tbo,  
				NULL  


FROM	(		SELECT		inv_mast.inv_mast_uid,  
							oe_line.ship_loc_id location_id,  
							oe_line.source_loc_id source_location_id,  
							(	oe_line.qty_ordered 
								- oe_line.qty_allocated 
								- oe_line.qty_on_pick_tickets 
								- oe_line.qty_invoiced 
								- oe_line.qty_canceled 
								- oe_line.qty_staged
							) 
								- COALESCE(v_oe_line_po.qty_transferred, 0) obt_qty_needed,  
							0 tbo_qty_needed  
				FROM		oe_line  
				INNER JOIN  location ON (location.location_id = oe_line.ship_loc_id )  
				INNER JOIN  oe_hdr ON (oe_hdr.order_no = oe_line.order_no )  
  
				INNER JOIN  inv_mast ON (oe_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_mast.inv_mast_uid )  
				INNER JOIN  inv_loc ON	(inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid ) AND  
										(location.location_id = inv_loc.location_id )  
				LEFT JOIN (		SELECT		oe_line_po.order_number,     
											oe_line_po.line_number,   
											SUM(oe_line_po.quantity_on_po) qty_transferred   
								FROM		oe_line_po    
								INNER JOIN	transfer_hdr on transfer_hdr.transfer_no = oe_line_po.po_no  
								WHERE		oe_line_po.delete_flag = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.completed = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.cancel_flag = 'N'  
										AND oe_line_po.connection_type = 'T'  
										AND COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') <> 'Y'  
								GROUP BY	oe_line_po.order_number,   
											oe_line_po.line_number  
						)		AS			v_oe_line_po ON (v_oe_line_po.order_number = oe_line.order_no)  
														AND (v_oe_line_po.line_number = oe_line.line_no)  
				LEFT JOIN	system_setting ss ON (ss.name = 'incl_stk_bo_on_chold_in_rqmt')   
											AND (ss.configuration_id = 0)

CREATE TRIGGER t_transfer_line_stock_status_uid
ON transfer_line
FOR INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
AS
BEGIN

--Trigger populates inv_loc_stock_status.qty_to_transfer with the changes
--to the quantity on transfer for an item at the source location.

	declare 
		@rowcount int,
		@temp int
		
	set @rowcount=@@rowcount
	set nocount on
		
	declare @holding table(
			location_id	decimal(19,0),
			inv_mast_uid int,
			qty_to_transfer decimal(19,9)
		)
	
	IF (@rowcount = 0)
	BEGIN
		RETURN
	END

	--
	-- Create a summary in the holding table
	--
	insert into @holding 
	(location_id, inv_mast_uid, qty_to_transfer)
	select
		from_location_id,
		inv_mast_uid,
		sum(qty_to_transfer)
	from
	(
		select
			transfer_hdr.from_location_id,
			inserted.inv_mast_uid,
			sum(
				case 
					-- Riv USA 11/11/09 Scopus 840390: Include row_status = 2 (fully shipped). Take into account qty received to get value of qty_to_transfer in inv_loc_stock_status.
					-- qty_to_transfer should be the qty remaining to be transfered. 
					when (row_status IN (0, 2)) then inserted.qty_to_transfer - inserted.qty_received --Not Cancelled
					else 0
				end
			) as qty_to_transfer
		from 
			inserted
			inner join transfer_hdr 
				on transfer_hdr.transfer_no = inserted.transfer_no
		where
			COALESCE(inserted.line_type, '') <> 'S'
		group by 
			transfer_hdr.from_location_id,
			inserted.inv_mast_uid
		union all
		select
			transfer_hdr.from_location_id,
			deleted.inv_mast_uid,
			sum(
				case 
					-- Riv USA 11/11/09 Scopus 840390: Include row_status = 2 (fully shipped). Take into account qty received to get value of qty_to_transfer in inv_loc_stock_status.
					-- qty_to_transfer should be the qty remaining to be transfered. 
					when (row_status IN (0, 2)) then (deleted.qty_to_transfer - deleted.qty_received) * -1 --Not Cancelled
					else 0
				end
			) as qty_to_transfer
		from 
			deleted
			inner join transfer_hdr 
				on transfer_hdr.transfer_no = deleted.transfer_no
		where
			COALESCE(deleted.line_type, '') <> 'S'
		group by 
			transfer_hdr.from_location_id,
			deleted.inv_mast_uid
	) t
	group by 
		from_location_id,
		inv_mast_uid

	if @@rowcount=0
		return
	
	--
	-- Insert a blank entry if this is a new row
	--

	insert into inv_loc_stock_status
	(location_id,inv_mast_uid,qty_to_transfer)

	transfer_no decimal(19,0)
	, line_no int
	, inv_mast_uid int
	, qty_to_transfer decimal(19,9)
)

insert into @inserted
select transfer_no, line_no, inv_mast_uid, qty_to_transfer from inserted where inserted.delete_flag = 'N'

insert into @deleted
select transfer_no, line_no, inv_mast_uid, qty_to_transfer from deleted where deleted.delete_flag = 'N'

INSERT INTO temp_po_loc_summary
(
	company_id
	, location_id
	, summary_date
	, summary_group_code
	, summary_cd
	, summary_value
	, summary_hdr_count
	, summary_line_count
	, processed
)
select
	company_id
	, location_id
	, @date
	, 1300
	, type
	, sum(value)
	, sum(hdr_count)
	, sum(line_count)
	, 'N'
from
(
	select 
		transfer_hdr.company_id
		, transfer_hdr.from_location_id as location_id
		, 1690 as type
		, sum(inserted.qty_to_transfer * inv_loc.moving_average_cost) as value --Aproximation that is not required to be updated when MAC changes
		, count(distinct l.transfer_no)as hdr_count
		, count(*)  as line_count
	from @inserted inserted
	inner join transfer_hdr  WITH (NOLOCK)on inserted.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no
	inner join inv_loc WITH (NOLOCK) 
		on transfer_hdr.from_location_id = inv_loc.location_id 
		and inserted.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid
	left outer join 
	(
		select 
			distinct inserted.transfer_no 
		from @inserted inserted
		where
			not exists 
			(
				select 1 
				from transfer_line  WITH (NOLOCK)
				where 
					inserted.transfer_no = transfer_line.transfer_no 
					and inserted.line_no != transfer_line

ransfer_hdr.to_location_id)
		INNER JOIN transfer_line (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										 AND (transfer_line.inv_mast_uid = inv_loc.inv_mast_uid)
										 AND ((( transfer_line.row_status <> 1 )
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id = to_loc.company_id))
										  OR  ((transfer_line.row_status = 0)
										 AND (inv_loc.company_id <> to_loc.company_id)))
										 AND (transfer_line.delete_flag <> 'Y')
										 AND (COALESCE(transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag, 'N') = 'Y')

		LEFT JOIN (SELECT	transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
							,SUM(CASE	WHEN transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received <= transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
												AND transfer_shipment_line.row_status_flag = 974 THEN
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_received
										ELSE
											transfer_shipment_line.sku_qty_shipped 
								 END) AS transfer_shipment_quantity
				   FROM	transfer_shipment_line (NOLOCK)
				   INNER JOIN transfer_shipment_hdr (NOLOCK) ON (transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid = transfer_shipment_line.transfer_shipment_hdr_uid)
				   GROUP BY transfer_shipment_hdr.transfer_no
							,transfer_shipment_line.transfer_line_no
				) AS drv_transfer_shipment ON (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no)
										  AND (drv_transfer_shipment.transfer_line_no = transfer_line.line_no)
		GROUP BY inv_loc.company_id
				,to_loc.company_id
				,inv_loc.location_id
				,inv_mast.inv_mast_uid
				,inv_mast.item_id

	RETURN
END

CREATE VIEW p21_view_scp_get_transfer_info
AS
SELECT  transfer_hdr.company_id
	   ,transfer_hdr.transfer_no
	   ,transfer_hdr.from_location_id
	   ,transfer_hdr.to_location_id
	   ,transfer_hdr.transfer_date
	   ,transfer_hdr.shipping_date
	   ,transfer_hdr.planned_recpt_date
	   ,transfer_hdr.oe_transfer_reserve_flag
	   ,transfer_hdr.carrier_id
	   ,address.name AS carrier_name
	   ,transfer_hdr.shipping_route_uid
	   ,shipping_route.route_code
	   ,shipping_route.route_description
	   ,transfer_hdr.complete_flag
	   ,transfer_hdr.delete_flag
	   ,transfer_line.line_no
	   ,transfer_line.inv_mast_uid
	   ,inv_mast.item_id
	   ,inv_mast.item_desc
	   ,transfer_line.unit_of_measure
	   ,CAST(transfer_line.qty_to_transfer / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_to_transfer
	   ,CAST(transfer_line.qty_transferred / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_shipped
	   ,CAST(transfer_line.qty_received / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_received
	   ,CAST((transfer_line.qty_to_transfer - transfer_line.qty_transferred) / transfer_line.unit_size AS Dec(19,9)) AS unit_qty_remaining
	   ,item_revision.revision_level AS trans_revision_level
	   ,transfer_line.row_status AS row_status_flag
	   ,transfer_line.delete_flag AS line_delete_flag
	   ,transfer_line.date_created
	   ,transfer_line.date_last_modified
 FROM p21_view_transfer_hdr AS transfer_hdr
INNER JOIN p21_view_transfer_line AS transfer_line ON transfer_line.transfer_no = transfer_hdr.transfer_no
INNER JOIN (SELECT prod_order_line_component.inv_mast_uid
			  FROM p21_view_prod_order_line_component AS prod_order_line_component
			 WHERE prod_order_line_component.complete <> 'Y'
			   AND prod_order_line_component.other_charge = 'N'
			   AND prod_order_line_component.service_labor_uid IS NULL
			   AND (prod_order_line_component.qty_requested - prod_order_line_component.qty_allocated - COALESCE(prod_order_line_component.qty_canceled, 0) - 
			        COALESCE(prod_order_line_component.qty_used, 0) - prod_order_line_component.qty_on_pick_tickets - prod_order_line_component.qty_confirmed - 
				    COALESCE(prod_order_line_component.qty_scrapped, 0) > 0)
			 GROUP BY prod_order_line_component.inv_mast_uid) AS drv_AssemblyComponents ON drv_AssemblyComponents.inv_mast_uid = transfer_line.inv_mast_uid
INNER JOIN p21_view_inv_mast AS inv_mast ON inv_mast.inv_mast_uid = transfer_line.inv_mast_uid
 LEFT JOIN p21_view_address AS addr
